key_files.relevance: Existing test config; E2E needs a separate playwright.config.ts with its own testDir and globalSetup
All dev workflows go through Make; e2e target must follow phony + ## help comment pattern; uses docker compose V2 (space not hyphen)
Existing relay service definition; e2e compose adds bunker+app (or keeps bunker in Docker, app on host); reuses strfry.conf mount
Relay config tuned for dev; no write-policy plugin so all events accepted; port 7777; can be reused verbatim for E2E relay
Documents all NEXT_PUBLIC_ env overrides; E2E build env vars should be documented here
output: 'export' (static); basePath='/notestr' only when NODE_ENV=production; E2E build uses NODE_ENV=test to get no basePath
connectBunker() / restoreNip46Session() are the exact paths Playwright exercises; session stored in localStorage at 'notestr-nip46-payload'
NEXT_PUBLIC_RELAYS baked in at build time; E2E build must set this to ws://localhost:7777
Establishes describe/it/expect style; explicit vitest imports (no globals); co-located test pattern
Missing: @playwright/test, serve (static server). NDK ^3.0.3 already present — NDKNip46Backend is in that package

patterns.name: Co-located unit tests
patterns.description: test files sit next to module they test, named <module>.test.ts

patterns.name: Explicit vitest imports
patterns.description: No globals; every test file imports describe/it/expect from 'vitest'

patterns.name: Make as sole task runner
patterns.description: All build/test/dev/relay commands go through make; npm scripts are thin aliases

patterns.name: Inline ## help comments
patterns.description: Makefile targets use ## comment for auto-generated help output

patterns.name: Platform-stamped node_modules
patterns.description: node_modules target writes uname -sm to .platform and re-installs on platform change

patterns.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_ relay override
patterns.description: Relay URLs baked into static bundle via env var; not runtime-configurable

patterns.name: Single NDK connect pattern
patterns.description: new NDK → connect(timeout) → signer.blockUntilReady() used everywhere

similar_features.name: NIP-46 bunker connect
similar_features.description: connectBunker() in src/lib/nostr.ts; NDKNip46Signer.bunker(ndk, url, localKey)

similar_features.name: Relay health check pattern
similar_features.description: ndk.connect(NDK_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS) with 4s timeout is the existing connect pattern

architecture.relay: strfry via Docker, port 7777, no auth required
architecture.nip46_flow: Browser opens NDK → NDKNip46Signer.bunker() → blockUntilReady() → stores session in localStorage
architecture.mls_groups: MarmotClient from marmot-ts wraps NDK; group state stored in IndexedDB via idb-keyval
architecture.task_events: Task state as Nostr events inside MLS groups; task-store.tsx / task-reducer.ts manage local state

extension_points: Makefile — add e2e and e2e-install targets
docker-compose.e2e.yml — add relay with ephemeral volume
playwright.config.ts — new file at repo root
e2e/ directory — new directory for fixtures and tests

testing.framework: Vitest 4.1 for unit tests; Playwright needed for E2E
testing.unit_test_pattern: co-located .test.ts files, no globals, explicit vitest imports
testing.e2e_gap: No E2E setup exists; no @playwright/test in devDependencies
testing.browser_env: Static app needs serve to host ./out; Playwright connects to http://localhost:3100

conventions: TypeScript throughout (all .ts/.tsx); bunker fixture uses .mjs (ESM, top-level await)
NODE_ENV=test for E2E build avoids basePath=/notestr
